summary: Document stamping with proper 350x310 dimensions verified. The fix (frontend sending full dimensions instead of scaled-down) is working correctly. Backend confirms receiving Target 350x310. Both certification and notarization stamp types tested. QR code verification works.

Backend server.py lines 2979-2980 correctly receives and uses target_width=350 and target_height=310
DEBUG logs in backend confirm: 'Generated 1000x1060, Target 350x310' and 'Target size: 350x310'
QR code verification endpoint works: /api/verify/stamp/{stamp_id} returns valid=true
